headline: Marriott (MAR): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Since July 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 70.5%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, Marriott has surged 162% to $371 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 14.7% in the last six months thanks to its solid quarterly results, beating the S&P by 7.5%.

headline: Delta stock uneasy as jet fuel costs weigh on airline: Q2 earnings takeaways
summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) flew past its second quarter estimates with the airway operator reporting revenue of $17.67 billion and adjusted earnings of $1.56 per share. While boasting strong demand, the airline is still contending with elevated fuel prices stemming from the US-Iran war. Yahoo Finance Senior Transports Reporter Pras Subramanian comes on Market Catalysts to analyze the biggest takeaways from Delta's earnings release.
